title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at Anna University South Asia Partners - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at Anna University South Asia Partners - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Anna University South Asia Partners, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Curriculum Developer for our Jodhpur operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Anna University South Asia Partners:
Anna University South Asia Partners is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in Child Psychology
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in E-learning
• Proficiency in Data Analysis
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in Educational Technology

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Annual performance appraisal
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Flexible working hours
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Jodhpur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Anna University South Asia Partners!
